scenarios.query: Run a full health audit of this repository.
expected_behavior: Recognizes a repo-shaped audit, not a single-diff review
Ranks the applicable repo audits (architecture, dependencies, config/build, docs, compliance, enforcement, IaC, maintainability) by relevance
Synthesizes the audit findings into one ranked report via reference/synthesis.md

scenarios.query: Thorough, comprehensive audit — use all relevant lenses across the whole repo.
expected_behavior: Recognizes comprehensive mode from 'thorough / all relevant lenses'
Runs every relevant repo audit uncapped rather than a top few
Applies the comprehensive Nit-pinned floor so long-tail maintainability findings surface

scenarios.query: We just added a new third-party dependency and a Dockerfile — audit the supply-chain and infra implications.
expected_behavior: Ranks auditing-dependencies-and-supply-chain and auditing-infrastructure-as-code highest by relevance
Produces one synthesized report rather than per-lens fragments
